raw:
[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {
    "idx": 1,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Just not my thing."},
      {"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The middle third drags with padding missions."},
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The spark? Missing."},
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "No classic Battlefield soul"},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Specialists never really clicked for me."},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Matches feel chaotic in a weird way, not the good Battlefield kind."},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "Gunplay is fine, content is there, and technically it’s no longer on life support."},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "Sometimes fun"}
    ]
  },
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},
  {
    "idx": 3,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Do not buy this game if you don't want to turn on secure boot on your system."},
      {"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "EA's stupid decisions make it not worth it in the long run."},
      {"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "It literally defeats the purpose of \"using secureboot to help protect against cheating\" if you let people play anyway if they can't enable secureboot."},
      {"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "You can also get around secureboot and cheat anyway, as people have done time and time again in this game and in BF6"},
      {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Also it's EA and they've got a shady past and are a pretty bad company, so this is all expected."},
      {"aspect": "cheating", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it does literally nothing to prevent cheating."},
      {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "CSM (one of the things you need to turn on) destroys your performance"}
    ]
  },
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "eventually boring"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "after around 7 hours of playing though the game pretty much just an afk simulator"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Super simple, nice music, really relaxing game!"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Simple, relaxing game for building and managing a tavern."}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very Addicting"}]},
  {
    "idx": 9,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I found the research and quest aspects to be broken."},
      {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Many of the researches were very so-so- rewards, with some being just seemingly nothing or confusing."},
      {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "When you hire a new person they are assigned permanently to the new kitchen or bar you built, great, but also assigned to every floor??? Ahhh!"},
      {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I felt like once I got to 10 hours I had built my tavern and really enjoyed it, but there was little to do."},
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it was a grind and not super fun to get there"},
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Money piled up, workers started making 100 gold a day, I had like 300 researchers before I realized the hard stop of needing guests to come in."},
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Then I deleted half my hotel rooms and made more tables."},
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "I enjoyed this game. I think it is find for achievement hunting, look at my blue ribbon, wooo~!"},
      {"aspect": "customization", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "there was a lot of attention to certain details, which was so funny to me- like the people in the bathroom get pixelated. So respectful! I laughed. This game is cute, you'll like it."}
    ]
  },
  {
    "idx": 10,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the villians are incredibly shallow and everyone treats them like insane social commentary."},
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "sexual assault bad = standard take, kamoshida bad = life-changing revelation about the relations between susceptible women and powerful men."},
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it's easily the most lackluster game in the entire extended series in expressing what it really wants to be, it's just a classic good guy vs bad guy until you (situationally) face off with Maruki."},
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the game doesn't delve into especially novel or controversial angles on power dynamics; it presents an extreme, villainous example and lets the player feel righteous defeating it."},
      {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the phantom thieves are designed as this chaotic, immature group, but their behavior is almost entirely in-line with the law routes of other games"},
      {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "even when society turns against them mid-story, the narrative ultimately vindicates them rather than forcing a philosophical reckoning; all the while, you're harboring a cat who incessantly lusts over and makes incredibly sexual and inappropriate comments towards a female party member for the entirety of the game"},
      {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Morgana never changes, he never stops being a creep, he never stops making comments towards Ann or belittling Ryuji, but it's okay because he's one of the good guys."}
    ]
  },
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Masterpiece"}]},
  {
    "idx": 12,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the music is fire"},
      {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the story is great"},
      {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the characters are memorable"},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the gameplay is good"},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it's just a peak game man"}
    ]
  },
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Slow start but then becomes one of the best games you will ever play."}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Easily the best game in every way. The soundtrack is phenomenal."}]},
  {
    "idx": 15,
    "aspects": [
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "It's a good SPACE game with a ton of freedom and that's why I recommend it."},
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I spent 30 bucks on Outer Worlds for the same experience and all I got was pretty much Bioshock 1 in space"},
      {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "It has the freedom to go to any planet, reset myself in a different universe all together, romance my companions, and fly any ship I want."},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "It's a good SPACE game with a ton of freedom and that's why I recommend it."},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I spent 30 bucks on Outer Worlds for the same experience and all I got was pretty much Bioshock 1 in space"},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "It has the freedom to go to any planet, reset myself in a different universe all together, romance my companions, and fly any ship I want."},
      {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "But enough rambling, all I'm saying is I spent 30 bucks on Outer Worlds for the same experience and all I got was pretty much Bioshock 1 in space"}
    ]
  },
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "This game has come a long way and it is an enjoyable experience at this point. Now if only they could get rid of the loading screens."}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "not as bad as people say. look for fun and you'll find it"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Honestly it's gotten better over the years and since the last DLC and patch."}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Don't waste your time, if you want an RPG of this style, go play the Gothic Remake, or if that's not out yet, Skyrim again."}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "100% kill your heir and ruin your run"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Endless replayability"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "A world of possibilities in your PC"}, {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Highly addictive"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Runs even on potato"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "But how much will it cost you? Everything"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "constant expansions and updates"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "So much content"}, {"aspect": "customization", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Stash Tabs are a game changer"}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "they carry over to POE2"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "can't even enjoy this game without getting kicked for connectivity issues"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "under 1 GB, and low PC requirements"}]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "has some moral choices to do"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "True simulator of border checkpoint in cold war"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "its fun"}]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "game isn't good"}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "should be acquired during discount"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Can't play as sweden"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the mod is not available anymore"}, {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "♥♥♥♥ this game"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "allows you to run your country the way you want to run it"}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "stressful game. has its good and bad moments. really have to be in the mood though or its just annoying."}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "made me speak in a chinese accent, great game"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is a addiction it ruins ur sleep once u play youll never wanna go to work /schoool it will ruin ur life"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Rocket League is one of those games that's impossible to put down — I've sunk hundreds of hours into it and still find myself coming back, chasing that perfect aerial or that one clean redirect that makes everything click. The gameplay itself is genuinely brilliant: simple enough to pick up in minutes, but the ceiling on skill is basically infinite, and every goal you score feels earned through pure mechanics rather than luck."},
    {"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "removing trading, gutting the progression system, and turning what used to be a thriving community into a cash-grab storefront was a gut punch to longtime fans."},
    {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the toxicity in lobbies is real too"},
    {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the core game is still one of the best ever made, and I'd recommend it to anyone who wants a competitive experience unlike anything else"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nothing compares to the rush of a last second save or the high of a perfect goal and even the heartbreak of missing an open net is part of the endless joy that puts this game in my top five of all time despite me not even calling myself a gamer it’s just a decade of unmatched excitement that never ends"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "As fun as it gets"}]},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Addiction is this game. I have never been the same. 10/10 don't buy the second game"}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "customization", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "having all kinds of mods on this game makes it ten times better"}]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors, horrible lag, crashing, freezing that continued AFTER I seemingly closed the game, and the game outright REFUSING to load maps or turn on/off mods."},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "What a waste of a game, and a waste of MY hard earned money on a product that is $32 more expensive than it should be."}
  ]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "Vanilla game is okay, its not great."},
    {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler) and its completely open as to how you want your character to play out, it doesnt force you into a specific type."},
    {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive."},
    {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics, both in seiges and in battles."},
    {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Wars are persistent and sometimes seem pointlessly invoked and when this happens continuously as you are trying to rebuild or work on other things it came become incredibly frustrating."},
    {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor."},
    {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "There is so much potential in the towns and villages if they were more interactive."},
    {"aspect": "exploration", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Hideouts are bland and monotonous."}
  ]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is fun and addicting"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "its ok"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "EVERY THING IS PERFECT"}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "very vreatice, very unique, very fun and the art in the game is fire!"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Great fun with much replayability."}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "anime girl squad with kinda unappropriate visual fighting a cosmic horror beyond human imagination"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "i really like this game"}]},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "fun but a little hard not that hard thought unless you have a skill issue"}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Rage-Inducing!"}]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": [{"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive"}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a game that actually requires time effort and practice to master the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "one of few games that makes you put in your blood sweat and tears to grind and complete certain achievements/challenges"}]},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "good fun game!"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "but the tv show bad!"}]},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "procedurally generated planets (including weather, terrain, etc.), animals, plants, encounters, etc."},
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "an exercise in tedium and repetition"},
    {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "totally unnecessary"},
    {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "genuinely one of the worst user interfaces I've ever used in a game"},
    {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I spent 60 hours in this game"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Infinite loading screen on vr... waited for 30 minutes, everything hurts."}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "for 10 years they been tossing out free updates"},
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "get lost in the game, have fun, do what you wish"},
    {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "never forget sodium or oxygen, you'll need a lot of it"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Its fun now after all the updates. It was really bad on launch."}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "No Man's Sky might not be the greatest game ever, but it will still take 5 hours from my day in the blink of an eye."}]}
]
